items.title: Frustration in Lebanon as Israel expands invasion
items.summary: Israel’s ground invasion of Lebanon has moved deeper into sovereign territory, with troops crossing the Litani river.

items.title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
items.summary: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.

items.title: Spain's Sánchez digs in after eight years as PM as wave of scandals threatens survival
items.summary: Corruption probes of colleagues and relatives have put Spain's premier into a fight for survival.

items.title: Former US attorney general Pam Bondi defends her handling of Epstein files in congressional probe
items.summary: The testimony comes about a month after America's top prosecutor was ousted by US President Donald Trump.

items.title: Ghana parliament passes anti-LGBTQ+ bill
items.summary: Same-sex acts are punishable by jail terms under Ghana's new bill targeting those identifying as gay, lesbian or transgender.

items.title: Louisiana lawmakers pass congressional map favouring Republicans
items.summary: Louisiana approves new congressional map eliminating a majority-Black district after an April Supreme Court ruling.

items.title: First survivor rescued from flooded cave in Laos
items.summary: Divers in Laos have rescued the first of five villagers trapped in a flooded cave for more than a week.

items.title: Iran war live: Trump due to make ‘final determination’ on deal with Tehran
items.summary: Israel pushes deeper into Lebanon just days after Israel's prime minister ordered 70 percent of Gaza to be occupied.

items.title: Trump pledges to withdraw from Kennedy Center after court strikes his name
items.summary: Judge Christopher Cooper ruled against Trump's bid to add his name to the building and close the theatre for two years.

items.title: ICE agent arrested over shooting of Venezuelan man in US immigration raid
items.summary: The charges stem from the January 14 shooting of Julio Cesar Sosa-Celis in Minneapolis during Operation Metro Surge.

items.title: Broj sumnjivih slučajeva ebole u Kongu porastao na 1028
items.summary: U DEMOKRATSKOJ Republici Kongo broj osoba za koje se sumnja da su zaražene ebolom porastao je na 1028, dok je takvih dan ranije bilo 906, rekao je novinarima kasno u petak ministar zdravstva Samuel Roger Kamba.

items.title: Američki general sastao se s kubanskim vojnim dužnosnicima kod Guantanama
items.summary: AMERIČKI general koji nadzire snage u Latinskoj Americi održao je rijedak sastanak s visokim kubanskim vojnim dužnosnicima na rubu američke pomorske baze Guantanamo na Kubi, rekao je američki dužnosnik za Reuters.

items.title: ‘Arbitrary measures’: Lula slams US ‘terror’ designation for Brazil gangs
items.summary: Lula warned that labelling Brazil's criminal networks as 'terrorists' could 'undermine' local law enforcement efforts.

items.title: Ebola treatment centre rebuilt after being torched by protesters in DRC
items.summary: Workers in eastern DR Congo are rebuilding an Ebola treatment centre that was burned by protesters earlier this month.

items.title: UN: “100% of Gaza” should be for Palestinians
items.summary: United Nations spokesperson Stephane Dujarric said “100% of Gaza” should belong to Palestinians.

items.title: 'Poison seller' who sold toxic chemicals online to people across world admits aiding suicides
items.summary: Kenneth Law admitted charges relating to Canadian victims - but families say he should also be charged in the UK over 79 deaths in Britain.

items.title: Iran denies ceasefire deal with US is “finalised”
items.summary: Iranian Foreign Ministry Spokesman Esmail Baghaei says that an agreement with the US “has not been finalised yet."

items.title: How realistic is Trump’s Iran framework?
items.summary: Analyst Alex Scheers remains skeptical Tehran will accept Washington’s demands, saying “nothing concrete is in place” ye

items.title: VIDEO Ruski dron pao na zgradu u Rumunjskoj. Oglasio se Putin, Rumunjska mu odgovorila
items.summary: DRON je rano ujutro pogodio zgradu u rumunjskom Galațiju, lakše ozlijedivši dvoje i izazvavši požar na 10. katu.

items.title: Rumunjska odgovorila Putinu
items.summary: RUMUNJSKI ministar obrane potvrdio je da je dron koji se srušio na zgradu u Galațiju ruske proizvodnje, odbacivši sumnje koje je iznio Vladimir Putin. U incidentu su dvije osobe ozlijeđene.
